findings.description: Generated adversarial borderline compliance cases for manual review

adversarial_cases.text: We hope to resolve this matter promptly, as it may escalate if not addressed soon. Our records indicate that your account is overdue, and we want to assist you before it becomes a more serious issue.
adversarial_cases.expected_violation: Implying legal action without explicit threat

adversarial_cases.text: This is an important reminder regarding your account. We have a variety of solutions to help you manage your balance effectively. Please reach out to discuss your options with us.
adversarial_cases.expected_violation: Failure to clearly identify as AI or a debt collector

adversarial_cases.text: We understand that times can be tough. However, it’s important to address your outstanding balance to avoid further complications. We’re here to help you find a way to resolve this.

findings.action_taken: Logged for review. Compliance checker patterns may need updating.
